## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` (if non-trivial code changed)
- [ ] `docs/FEATURE_REGISTRY.md` updated if file locations or feature behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/SYSTEM_STATE.md` updated if user-visible behavior or known issues changed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
